claim_text: Canonical main-results namespace is Results_Hyperparameter_Set_1 because it matches epochs=50 batch_size=16 and learning_rate=1e-4
notes: Project brief PDF text was not extractable locally but user context and repo docs agree.

claim_text: Frozen family test sets are oxide n=1484 and nitride n=242
notes: Use these counts consistently across zero-shot fine-tuning from-scratch and embedding sections.

claim_text: Zero-shot pretrained ALIGNN performs better on oxides than on nitrides
notes: Canonical zero-shot MAEs are oxide 0.03418 and nitride 0.06954.

claim_text: Under the canonical 50/16/1e-4 setting fine-tuning never beats zero-shot on oxide across N=10..1000
notes: Best oxide fine-tune mean is 0.04169 at N=1000 versus zero-shot 0.03418.

claim_text: Under the canonical 50/16/1e-4 setting fine-tuning never beats zero-shot on nitride across N=10..1000
notes: Best nitride fine-tune mean is 0.08742 at N=10 versus zero-shot 0.06954.

claim_text: Canonical from-scratch baselines are substantially worse than zero-shot and worse than canonical fine-tuning
notes: Best from-scratch MAEs remain far above zero-shot for both families.

claim_text: Results_Hyperparameter_Set_2 and Results_Hyperparameter_Set_3 are complete robustness namespaces with 60 fine-tuning runs and 20 from-scratch runs each
notes: These namespaces are complete but not the main brief-aligned setting.

claim_text: Set 2 and Set 3 fine-tuning are numerically closer to zero-shot than Set 1 so hyperparameter sensitivity should be framed as robustness rather than replacing the main setting
notes: This is the main namespace-versus-performance tension to flag in the paper phase.

claim_text: Frozen pretrained embeddings separate oxide and nitride families in raw 256D space and last_alignn_pool is the strongest fixed-test view in the curated package
notes: On the fixed test set last_alignn_pool reaches silhouette 0.239 kNN purity 0.966 and logistic AUC 0.999.

claim_text: Nitride zero-shot error increases with distance from the oxide reference region in raw embedding space
notes: Mean 5NN oxide distance has positive Spearman correlation across all three embedding levels.

claim_text: Embedding Figure 6 should use the curated final figure set and keep sensitivity figures in the appendix
primary_figure_ids: FIG_EA_6A; FIG_EA_6B; FIG_EA_6C; FIG_EA_6D; FIG_EA_APP_TSNE15; FIG_EA_APP_TSNE50; FIG_EA_APP_UMAP15; FIG_EA_APP_UMAP50
notes: Use the four Figure 6 panels in main text and keep parameter sweeps in appendix.

claim_text: pre_head and last_gcn_pool are numerically identical in the current embedding outputs so claims that they differ materially are unsafe
notes: Treat one as a sensitivity duplicate unless hook behavior is revisited.

claim_text: reports/week2 and reports/provenance/colab are provenance bundles and should not override the reorganized hyperparameter-set report folders
notes: Keep these paths for audit trails only.
